feature.name: Single-locale Faker providers
feature.description: Extract Faker factory and Generator wiring for en_US person, address, and phone_number providers with embedded locale data.
included_behaviors: construct Faker with locale en_US and default person/address/phone providers
generate deterministic fake names, addresses, and phone numbers with seed_instance
resolve localized provider modules and locale resource data
excluded_behaviors: multi-locale weighting and proxy locale switching
providers beyond person, address, and phone_number

entanglement.description: Provider methods depend on locale-specific data tables loaded through dynamic provider discovery and import paths.
signals: locale-scoped provider modules with embedded name/address lists
factory provider registration and weighted sampling

output.signature: Faker(locale: str = 'en_US', providers: list[str] | None = None, **config)
